Glomerular Filtration Rate (GFR) Test 
URL of this page: https://medlineplus.gov/lab-tests/glomerular-filtration-rate-gfr-test/ 
Glomerular Filtration Rate (GFR) Test 
To use the sharing features on this page, please enable JavaScript. 
What is a glomerular filtration rate (GFR) test? 
A glomerular filtration rate (GFR) test is a blood test that checks how well your kidneys are working. Your kidneys are two organs on either side of your spine near your waist. They have tiny filters called glomeruli. These filters remove waste and extra w
